title: Sqlitelogictest crash in aggregation query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INTEGER, col1 FLOAT, col2 VARCHAR(50), col3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO tab1(col0, col1, col2, col3) VALUES (1, 2.5, 'test', TRUE);
CREATE TABLE tab2(col4 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, col5 DATE, col6 TIMESTAMP);
SELECT AVG(col1) AS avg_col1 FROM tab1 WHERE col3 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY col0 HAVING COUNT(col2) > 0;
key_bug_features: Aggregation query with complex conditions causes crash
